title: アタシには向かない職業

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she darts across the turf, golden hair ablaze in the sunset, Gold
City's face is the picture of determination.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And... done! Pant, pant... My time! What's my time?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Really? ...Wow, it actually is. I... I did it!
choice_data_list: Simply amazing. They grow up so fast. Sniffle.
Simply amazing. They grow up so fast. Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ugh, do you have to be so extra all the time? But yeah... I guess I am amazing!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. You're over the top, and annoying, and tactless, and you really piss me off sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But you know, being a trainer really fits you. Maybe it's like, your
calling, or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you better not let that get to your head, though. You haven't
earned my full approval yet.
choice_data_list:
I'll do my utmost to live up to your every
expectation!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That there is exactly what I'm talking about! Ahaha! All right, time to hit up the gym for the rest of the evening. It's leg day after all...

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Manager? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to interrupt practice, but it's an emergency! This could be your
big break!

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Trainer! I'm going to have to cut practice short today!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wha—Who made you boss? We've still got tons to work on!

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text: Please, just hear me out. This will affect your future!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: My future?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So, turns out, I was just a substitute. Some hotshot model canceled
last minute, so I was called to fill in.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I got the job done, obviously. I always give one hundred-percent, no
matter what.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But then my manager said I gave a "safe and bland performance."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sure, it was a pretty big deal, even if I was just a sub. My big chance
to get noticed by all these superstar names.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I get where she's coming from, but like, can she not take away from
my training time? And get this—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
She's like, "Ever since you started hanging around that trainer, you've
been losing sight of your priorities as a model."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Like, I'm sorry, what?! Anyway, it got ugly. Ugh, what a disaster.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I know she's right. I haven't been as focused on work. Hard to
care about poses when all I can think about is running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Thing is, I promised to keep modeling so she'd let me enroll here.
Managed to convince her I could do both.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But now that I'm actually getting serious about racing, well... Not
exactly what I hoped for.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I really thought I could run two roads at once, but guess I just don't
have that kind of agility.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She falls silent, but her brooding expression tells me her thoughts are
still racing.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Say, Trainer... You somehow knew I'd make a decent runner, didn't
you?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You knew I wasn't just some pretty doll—that I could win out there on
the turf... And you still believe that, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? Hah... Okay, I've decided. Honestly don't know why I didn't do
this earlier.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What are you imagining? Relax, geez. If anything, it might be good
news for you. Because I...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Am going to quit modeling!
